zh.lifeSummary: 當Amelia Christina Fritz於大約1676年出生在德國時，她的父親Theiss Fritz20歲，母親Anna Bauer20歲。她於1698年與Georg Wilhelm Kell在海因里希_海普洛文次維德雷斯多福結婚。他們至少是2個兒子和2個女兒的父母。

zh-hans.lifeSummary: 当Amelia Christina Fritz于大约1676年出生在德国时，她的父亲Theiss Fritz20岁，母亲Anna Bauer20岁。她于1698年与Georg Wilhelm Kell在海因里希_海普洛文次維德雷斯多福结婚。他们至少是2个儿子和2个女儿的父母。

nameMeanings.name: Fritz
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of American Family Names © Patrick Hanks 2003, 2006.
meanings: German: from a pet form of the personal name Friedrich . This form of the surname is also found in Denmark, Sweden, the Netherlands, and France (Alsace and Lorraine), and also in central European countries such as Slovenia, Croatia, Czechia, and Slovakia, where it is more often spelled in the Slavicized form Fric (see below).

Americanized or Germanized form of Czech, Slovak, Slovenian, and Croatian Fric: from the personal name Fric, a pet form, of German origin (see above), of Old Czech and Slovak Fridrich, Slovenian Friderik, Croatian Fridrik, equivalents of German Friedrich .

variants.name: Friedrich
meanings: Some characteristic forenames:  German Kurt, Otto, Hans, Ernst, Ewald, Franz, Gerhard, Heiner, Heinz, Helmuth, Klaus, Reinhard.

German: from a personal name composed of the ancient Germanic elements frid, fred ‘peace’ + rīc ‘power’. The name was borne by a 9th-century Christian saint, bishop of Utrecht, and was a hereditary name among the Hohenstaufen ruling family; hence its popularity in central Europe.

variants.name: Fritzen
meanings: German and Danish: patronymic or pet form of   Fritz   (see   Friedrich  ).

variants.name: Fritzler
meanings: Some characteristic forenames:  German Kurt, Ulrich, Gerhart.
German: from Fritzel, an enlarged form of Fritz .

variants.name: Fritze
meanings: Some characteristic forenames:  German Erwin, Erna, Gunther, Hans, Kurt, Otto.

nameMeanings.name: Amelia
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of First Names © Patrick Hanks and Flavia Hodges 1990, 2003, 2006.
meanings: A blend of two medieval names: Emilia (which is of Latin origin: see Emily ) and the Latinized Germanic Amalia . Henry Fielding is sometimes credited with having coined it for the heroine of his novel Amelia ( 1751 ), but forms such as Meelia, Amaly and Aemelia occur from the 17th century onwards.

nameMeanings.name: Christina
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of First Names © Patrick Hanks and Flavia Hodges 1990, 2003, 2006.
meanings: Simplified form of Latin Christiana, feminine form of Christianus ( see Christian ), or a Latinized form of Middle English Christin ‘Christian’ (Old English christen, from Latin).

en.lifeSummary: When Amelia Christina Fritz was born about 1676, in Germany, her father, Theiss Fritz, was 20 and her mother, Anna Bauer, was 20. She married Georg Wilhelm Kell in 1698, in Rengsdorf, Neuwied, Rhineland, Prussia. They were the parents of at least 2 sons and 2 daughters.

fr.lifeSummary: Lorsque Amelia Christina Fritz est née environ 1676, à Allemagne, son père, Theiss Fritz, avait 20 ans et sa mère, Anna Bauer, avait 20 ans. Elle a épousé Georg Wilhelm Kell en 1698, à Rengsdorf, Neuwied, Rhénanie, Prusse. Ils ont eu au moins 2 fils et 2 filles.

de.lifeSummary: Als Amelia Christina Fritz um 1676 in Deutschland geboren wurde, war ihr Vater Theiss Fritz 20 und ihre Mutter Anna Bauer 20. Sie hat 1698 in Rengsdorf, Neuwied, Rheinprovinz, Preußen Georg Wilhelm Kell geheiratet. Sie hatten mindestens 2 Söhne und 2 Töchter.

it.lifeSummary: Quando Amelia Christina Fritz è nata il circa 1676 nel Germania, sua padre, Theiss Fritz, aveva 20 anni e sua madre, Anna Bauer, aveva 20 anni. Lei sposato Georg Wilhelm Kell nel 1698, nel Rengsdorf, Neuwied, Rheinprovinz, Preußen. Erano genitori di almeno 2 figli e 2 figlie.

ja.lifeSummary: Amelia Christina Fritzが約1676年にドイツで生まれた時，父Theiss Fritzは20歳，母Anna Bauerは20歳であった。1698年にプレウssンルヘインプロヴィンズネウウィエドレングスドルフでGeorg Wilhelm Kellと結婚した。彼らは少なくとも2人の息子と2人の娘の親であった。

ko.lifeSummary: Amelia Christina Fritz(이)가 대략 1676년 독일에서 태어났을 때, 그녀의 아버지 Theiss Fritz(은)는 20세였고, 그녀의 어머니 Anna Bauer(은)는 20세였다. 그녀는 1698년 프레우ss 리인프로빈츠 니우위드 렌그즈도르프에서 Georg Wilhelm Kell(와)과 결혼했다. 그들은 적어도 두 명의 아들과 두 명의 딸을 두었다.

pt.lifeSummary: Quando Amelia Christina Fritz nasceu aproximadamente 1676, em Alemanha, seu pai, Theiss Fritz, tinha 20 anos e sua mãe, Anna Bauer, tinha 20 anos. Ela casou-se com Georg Wilhelm Kell em 1698, em Rengsdorf, Neuwied, Rheinprovinz, Preußen. Eles tiveram pelo menos 2 filhos e 2 filhas.

ru.lifeSummary: Когда Amelia Christina Fritz родилась около 1676 г. в местности Германия, её отцу по имени Theiss Fritz было 20 лет, а матери, которую звали Anna Bauer, 20. Она вышла замуж за человека по имени Georg Wilhelm Kell в 1698 г. в местности ренгсдорф, неувиед, раинпровинз, Пруссия. У них было по крайней мере 2 сына и 2 дочери.

es.lifeSummary: Cuando Amelia Christina Fritz nació aproximadamente 1676, en Alemania, su papá, Theiss Fritz, tenía 20 años y su mamá, Anna Bauer, tenía 20 años. Se casó con Georg Wilhelm Kell en 1698, en Rengsdorf, Neuwied, Rheinprovinz, Preußen. Fueron padres de por lo menos 2 hijos y 2 hijas.
